stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Smoke detection in the aircraft cargo compartments is performed by four sensors: C1, C2, C3 and C4. Which of following will activate the alert?

options.a: When only the C1 and C3 sensors detect smoke.
options.b: Only when all sensors detect smoke.
options.c: When the C1 and C2 sensors detect smoke.
options.d: When only one sensor detects smoke.
